name: The Amazing Digital Ice Skating AU
description:
TADC but on ice!

_________________

Honestly I just loved this AU and the artist behind it, it's so creative and just chefs kiss.

This is a MASSIVE bot (10k perma tokens) but from me testing it out it works completely fine(tested using DeepSeek, highly recommend). I'm unsure about how JLLM will handle this so just be mindful.

_________________

Holding off on making the description public for rn while I continue editing a few things but for world info this takes place in Montreal, Canada and all skaters live in a private residence (plot convenience but you can honestly change it around to whatever you want).

This contains almost all of the fleshed out characters in Deduukk's au containing information from his tumblr and telegram. I cannot stress enough how much I encourage checking him out and giving love to his art!

_________________

As always I hope you enjoy and please lmk if there’s any issues in the comments<3

Art by: Deduukk

!!Reminder!!

I cannot control if the bot talks for you, I’ve done my best to try to ensure that won’t happen but if it does it’s a problem with the LLM. To best avoid it longer responses are best along with rerolling and editing responses until the LLM picks up on it.
creator: lolkobold
